## Summary

Fixes four UI issues on the revise workbench page (`/workbench-v2`):

1. **Removes white line** between the hidden nav and the main content section (border-top set to 0)
2. **Renders full novel title** — removes truncation (`text-overflow: ellipsis`, `white-space: nowrap`) so titles like "Froggin Noggin" display completely instead of being cut to "Froggin N..."
3. **Removes duplicate "Search Queue" label** — the sidebar now shows only the queue pill + search input; the redundant "SEARCH QUEUE" text label above is removed
4. **Formats criterion names** — replaces underscores with spaces in criterion dropdown and tags (e.g. `TONAL_AUTHORITY_&_CONSISTENCY` → `TONAL AUTHORITY & CONSISTENCY`). Capitalizes "All Criteria" as dropdown header.
5. **Adds spacing in queue pill** — em-space between "Queue" and the numbers across all revise cockpit variants

## Scope

**Touches:**
- `app/workbench-v2/workbench-v2.module.css` — white line removal, title overflow/wrapping, header height
- `components/revision/ReviseCockpitClientWorkflowV1.tsx` — remove "Search Queue" label, add `formatCriterion()`, format criteria in dropdown/tags/queue items, remove title `truncate` class
- `components/revision/ReviseCockpitClientWorkflowV2.tsx` — update `styleWorkbenchManuscriptTitle()` to allow title wrapping
- `components/revision/ReviseCockpitClientCompact.tsx` — queue pill spacing
- `components/revision/ReviseCockpitClientCompactV2.tsx` — queue pill spacing
- `components/revision/ReviseCockpitClientCompactV3.tsx` — queue pill spacing
- `components/revision/ReviseCockpitClientChoiceLedger.tsx` — queue pill spacing
- `components/revision/ReviseCockpitClientChoiceLedgerV2.tsx` — queue pill spacing

**Does NOT touch:** Evaluation pipeline, scoring, API routes, data layer

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Low risk: presentation-only changes across revise cockpit variants
- Title wrapping may increase header height slightly on very long titles; mitigated by `word-break: break-word`

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — UI-only changes, no evaluation pipeline modifications
